name: xiangqiboard.js
when_to_use: 需要把中国象棋 FEN 渲成含九宫、河界和中文棋子的 9×10 棋盘时用它,而非拿西洋棋盘或手写 SVG 凑——原生手写在专用盘面几何、棋子资源、翻转与位置动画上失败;规则、合法走子和棋谱解析不在本条。
why_valuable: AI 默认最多画出约 20% 可用的象棋盘,常漏九宫斜线、河界或把 9×10 坐标画错,更做不到稳定棋子资源与动画;该库把象棋专用棋盘 UI 闭环。

en.when_to_use: Use it instead of adapting a Western chessboard or hand-writing SVG when you need to render Chinese-chess FEN as a 9x10 board with palaces, a river, and Chinese pieces, because native implementations fail at specialized board geometry, piece assets, orientation, and position animation; rules, move legality, and game-record parsing are outside this entry.
en.why_valuable: AI can normally produce at most a roughly 20% usable Xiangqi board, often omitting palace diagonals or the river or getting 9x10 coordinates wrong, and it cannot provide stable piece assets and animation; this library closes the loop on Xiangqi-specific board UI.

data_in.note: picks supplies no release version and the repository has no public npm package; boot keeps version:null, pins assets to repository commit c36e1046c424e7abf1405904006043f6426b8ee8, and uses that commit's included 0.3.3 build.

schema.fen: string -- the piece-placement segment of Chinese-chess FEN: exactly 10 ranks separated by /, each expanding to 9 squares, with piece letters restricted to rnbakcp/RNBAKCP and empty-square counts 1..9; do not pass the remaining turn fields
schema.orientation?: 'red' | 'black' -- perspective at the bottom edge, default red

spec.note: The 9x10 board defaults to a 480x540px container; use a fixed px height, not vh or a percentage height. This legacy jQuery component uses document-level selectors for dragging, so the conservative thin-1 boot enables static display only.

data_in._why_no_example: 象棋 FEN 是 AI 原生记法,schema 钉死为库实际读取的 10 横行摆放段,不附 minimal example。
data_in.note: picks 未给发布版本且仓库无公共 npm;boot 保留 version:null,资源固定到仓库提交 c36e1046c424e7abf1405904006043f6426b8ee8,并使用该提交自带的 0.3.3 构建产物。

schema.fen: string —— 中国象棋 FEN 的 piece-placement 段:恰好 10 个以 / 分隔的横行,每行展开为 9 格,棋子字母限 rnbakcp/RNBAKCP 与空格计数 1..9;不要传其余回合字段

spec.note: 9×10 盘面默认容器 480×540px;必须用固定 px 高度,禁 vh/百分比高。此老式 jQuery 组件的拖子实现用 document 级选择器,thin-1 保守 boot 只开静态展示。

boot.codex: 同 artifact(sandbox iframe):先 ESM import jQuery,再 import pinned /gh/ 经典脚本与 head CSS;调用全局 Xiangqiboard(el,config)。

carriers.widget: conditional:静态展示可落 shadow 且 CSS 进 shadow;拖子依赖 document 级 jQuery id 选择器,shadow 下不承诺
carriers.codex: conditional:需允许 pinned /gh/ JS、CSS、棋盘 SVG 与棋子 img-cdn;无 uplink 需求

isolation.evidence: The library renders board DOM into the target container via jQuery `.append()` (x7) — not document.body — so no global DOM mutation. Its required CSS is an external stylesheet the boot places (document.head for artifact/codex, shadowRoot for widget); the library itself does not auto-inject style. Drag is bound via jQuery mousedown on pieces (x3) with mousemove/mouseup escalating to document/window level during an ACTIVE drag; with the boot's `draggable:false` no drag initiates, so no document-level listeners attach for static display (globalEvents=no here). shadowCompatible=conditional: static render works in shadow with CSS in the shadowRoot, but the drag path relies on document-level jQuery id selectors and isn't guaranteed in shadow (hence catalog keeps draggable:false).
